Thing I cannot wait to do together: walk beside you with no airport goodbye waiting at the end.
Future date idea: coffee, a slow walk, your hand in mine, and absolutely no rushing.
I cannot wait for the day I can say 'I miss you' and fix it by simply holding you.
አብረን ማድረግ የምፈልገው: እጅሽን ይዤ ቀስ ብለን መሄድ።
Future date idea: a quiet dinner where I spend half the time listening to you and the other half admiring you.
I cannot wait to learn all your everyday details in person: your routines, your little faces, your favorite snacks.
One day, distance will be a story we tell. Not the thing standing between us.
Future dream: celebrating your birthday beside you, not through a countdown.
